---
description: "Run a post-module regression sweep for adjacent modules and shared platform behaviors. Input: completed module number."
---

# Regression Sweep

After completing a module, validate adjacent workflows and shared platform stability.

## Regression Scope
- Adjacent module conversions/workflows (for example Quote->Order->Invoice)
- Shared navigation/menu order and visibility behavior
- Shared list/grid/filter behavior
- Permission enforcement and audit logging continuity
- Build/lint regressions in backend/frontend

## Required Output
- Regression checks run
- Pass/fail results
- Breakages with file references
- Suggested fixes and prioritization
